failedAssertions.reason: Data handlers for ideas and planningArtifacts now return 200, but recordSwipe action handler is NOT registered in root worker.ts. API returns 'No action handler registered for key record-swipe'. The full flow (swipe idea -> create planning artifact) cannot be tested.
failedAssertions.improvementFromRound1: Round 1: ideas/planningArtifacts data handlers missing - NOW FIXED. Round 2: Action handlers still missing.

failedAssertions.reason: Automation tier dropdown is now interactable (all three tiers visible and selectable). However, the approval enforcement behavior cannot be validated without creating actual delivery runs.
failedAssertions.improvementFromRound1: Round 1: Automation tier combobox non-interactive - NOW FIXED (dropdown works). Still blocked by no delivery runs to test approval behavior.

failedAssertions.reason: Backend registers deliveryRuns, workspaceLease, workspaceLeases data handlers, but UI has no component to display delivery runs, create runs, or show workspace/port metadata.
failedAssertions.improvementFromRound1: Round 1: Plugin backend 502 errors - NOW FIXED (handlers exist and return 200). Still missing: UI components for delivery run display.

failedAssertions.reason: Budget tab shows project-level budget input, backend enforces pause when budget exceeded, but UI does not display paused state or pause reason for budgets.
failedAssertions.improvementFromRound1: Round 1: Product Program prerequisite blocked testing - NOW RESOLVED. Still missing: UI element showing budget paused state.

failedAssertions.reason: Backend registers pauseAutopilot/resumeAutopilot actions, AutopilotSettings has paused state display code, but no Pause/Resume buttons are visible in UI. No delivery run section means run-level pause/resume cannot be tested.
failedAssertions.improvementFromRound1: Round 1: No active delivery run - STILL TRUE (no run UI). Additional issue: Pause/Resume buttons missing from autopilot settings.

systemicBlockers.description: Action handlers (recordSwipe, createPlanningArtifact) exist in autopilot/worker.ts but are NOT registered in root worker.ts. The root worker.ts registers ideas and planningArtifacts data handlers (lines 2475, 2516) but not the corresponding action handlers.

UI components missing for delivery run management. The backend has deliveryRuns, workspaceLeases, companyBudgets handlers, but the UI (src/autopilot/ui/index.tsx) has no DeliveryRunSection, no runs list, no workspace/port metadata display, and no Create Delivery Run button.
Budget pause state display missing. Backend enforces pause when autopilotUsedMinutes >= autopilotBudgetMinutes, but UI does not show a paused state message or reason when budgets are exceeded.

Automation tier approval enforcement cannot be tested without delivery runs. The dropdown selection works, but validating that Supervised requires approval, Semi-Auto pauses on issues, and Full Auto runs autonomously requires actual runs to be created.
systemicBlockers.triagedTo: Requires delivery run creation flow (VAL-AUTOPILOT-032 UI fix first)

frictions.description: Console shows multiple 502 Bad Gateway errors for resource loads even though backend data handlers return 200

progressFromRound1: Improvements observed in: (1) ideas and planningArtifacts data handlers now registered and return 200, (2) automation tier dropdown is now interactable, (3) backend 502 errors resolved. Remaining gaps: (1) action handlers not registered in root worker.ts, (2) UI components for delivery runs missing, (3) budget pause state UI missing, (4) pause/resume buttons missing.
